title: EQ - Select a value, close the Settings screen, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ setting persists after navigating away from and back to Device Settings on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Close the Settings screen (tap back or swipe away)
Navigate back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer
Repeat steps 4–9 for each remaining EQ value: Flat, Bright, Custom EQ
expected: The previously selected EQ value persists and is shown as selected when returning to the Equalizer settings screen, for all EQ values (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
